name_cn:
【Travel Star Green New Size】
Dior Mini Book tote
A retro and stylish statement piece ♡ The exquisite embroidery perfectly presents the look, adding a highlight to any outfit with just a casual carry. This mini style is adorable! The compact shape is also convenient for holding small bits and pieces. Who wears it is stylish. A must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Style: 1265/1286
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
